seo.title: Codeverta 소개 - 소프트웨어 회사와 비즈니스 기술 파트너
seo.description: Codeverta는 코드 품질, 투명한 커뮤니케이션, 실질적인 비즈니스 가치를 중시하는 개발자, 디자이너, IT 컨설턴트 팀입니다.
seo.keywords: Codeverta 소개, 소프트웨어 회사, 기술 파트너, IT 컨설팅

paragraphs: Codeverta was born from a simple conviction: every business, regardless of size, deserves a technology partner they can truly trust. Too often, digital projects fail because of poor communication, hidden costs, or results that do not meet expectations.

We are here to change that. As a team of professional developers, designers, and IT consultants, we focus on code quality, transparent communication, and client success. Our mission is to turn your digital vision into reliable solutions that deliver real business value.

description.before: At PT Zenit Technology Solution, we believe innovation should serve a higher purpose. We proudly pledge
description.pledge: more than 3% of our annual net profit
description.after: to support underprivileged cancer patients via

direct.title: Direct Support
direct.description: Helping families cover critical treatment costs.

ethical.title: Ethical Tech
ethical.description: Your projects directly fund social impact.
